title: Monitor management BIFs — monitor, demonitor, exit
purpose: MonitorSet and LinkSet data structures exist but are not callable from bytecode. This brief adds monitor/2, demonitor/1, and exit/2 as BIFs.
task: Add three BIFs to process_bifs.rs. Extend ProcessContext with monitor set access. Register in register_gate2_bifs().
boundaries: This brief SHALL NOT implement erlang:exit/1 (self-exit — different semantics from exit/2)
This brief SHALL NOT implement monitor by name (only by PID)
This brief SHALL NOT implement demonitor with options ([flush, info])

requirements.title: erlang:monitor/2
requirements.spec: erlang:monitor/2 SHALL accept (process, Pid), establish a unidirectional monitor, return a unique reference. Dead target immediately enqueues DOWN.
acceptance: Monitoring dead process sends immediate DOWN with noproc

requirements.title: erlang:demonitor/1
requirements.spec: erlang:demonitor/1 SHALL remove the monitor by reference. Invalid reference is a no-op.
acceptance: After demonitor, target exit does not send DOWN
Invalid reference is no-op returning true

requirements.title: erlang:exit/2
requirements.spec: erlang:exit/2 SHALL send an exit signal to target. Trapping target receives {EXIT, Caller, Reason}. Non-trapping with non-normal reason terminates. kill terminates unconditionally and propagates as killed.
acceptance: exit(Pid, normal) does not kill target
exit(Pid, reason) delivers {EXIT, Caller, reason} to trapping target
exit(Pid, kill) kills regardless of trap_exit
kill propagates as killed to links
